animechain.note: Only one public RPC is documented (official public-rpc.anime.xyz); no independent mirror found.

ape.note: Only 2 keyless endpoints found (dRPC + official ApeChain RPC); Ankr/1rpc/blastapi variants tried but all key-gated or unsupported.

apexfusionnexus.note: Only the official RPC is keyless; the only other listed endpoint (Tenderly gateway) requires an access token in the URL path.

arc.note: Arc mainnet (chain id 5042) has no public RPC yet; Circle docs (docs.arc.io) confirm only Arc Testnet (5042002) endpoints are published as of Jul 2026 ('Mainnet endpoints... published separately when available'). 0 verified.

ault.note: Ault Blockchain (Cosmos+EVM L1) has no free/keyless public RPC found; only paid Quicknode infra is documented. 0 verified.

bb1.note: chainKey 'bb1' = inEVM Mainnet (Injective L2, chain id 2525). The documented official RPC (mainnet.rpc.inevm.com/http) is dead (404). Only a thirdweb mirror verified working.

bevm.note: 3rd endpoint is a second BEVM-operated domain (bevm.io) alongside the two geb.network endpoints — all effectively the same operator; no true third-party mirror found.

botanix.note: Only 2 keyless endpoints found (Ankr + official); no third independent provider located.

bouncebit.note: Only the official fullnode RPC is documented/keyless for BounceBit mainnet.

camp.note: Only the current official RPC is keyless; Camp Network deprecated its old Gelato RaaS endpoint in June 2026.

canto.note: Canto's RPC ecosystem has degraded — most historically-listed community endpoints (ansybl.io, nodestake.top, dexvaults.com, chandrastation.com, plexnode.org, dRPC, Polkachu, dteam) are dead or no longer serve EVM JSON-RPC. Only gravitychain.io and a thirdweb mirror verified working.

citrea.note: Only the official Citrea RPC is documented; no independent mirror found (young chain).

codex.note: Only the official Codex (Conduit OP-stack chain) RPC is documented/keyless.

concrete.note: Concrete's own LayerZero OFT quickstart doc uses a literal 'https://INSERT-RPC' placeholder (no public RPC documented). Only candidate found (Tenderly gateway) requires an access-token path segment. 0 verified.

converge.note: Both verified endpoints (rpc.nutriemp.com / rpc.nutriemp-chain.link) resolve chain id 432 correctly and match LayerZero's declared nativeChainId for chainKey 'converge', but public registries (chainlist/chainid.network) label chain id 432 as 'NutriEmp Chain', not the Ethena/Securitize-announced 'Converge' chain — flagging this naming discrepancy. Both endpoints appear to be the same operator (not independent of each other).

cyber.note: Only official Cyber L2 endpoints found (rpc.cyber.co, cyber.alt.technology) — both operated by the Cyber team.

dexalot.note: Only 2 independent providers found (Avalanche subnet infra + thirdweb).

dfk.note: Only 2 independent providers found (Avalanche subnet infra + thirdweb); a second thirdweb subdomain was also verified but shares the same backend as the first, so it isn't counted as independent.

dinari.note: Only the Avalanche-subnet RPC (subnets.avax.network/dinari) is documented; LayerZero's own OFT quickstart for Dinari uses a literal 'https://INSERT-RPC' placeholder, confirming no other public RPC is published.

dm2verse.note: Official RPC (rpc.dm2verse.dmm.com) no longer resolves (DNS failure); only a thirdweb mirror verified working.

doma.note: Only 2 keyless endpoints found (dRPC + official); no third independent provider located for this young chain.

dos.note: only 2 keyless public RPC(s) found/verified after extensive search (chainlist dataset + targeted web search + provider-pattern probing); chain has limited third-party RPC provider coverage

ebi.note: only 1 keyless public RPC(s) found/verified after extensive search (chainlist dataset + targeted web search + provider-pattern probing); chain has limited third-party RPC provider coverage

edu.note: only 2 keyless public RPC(s) found/verified after extensive search (chainlist dataset + targeted web search + provider-pattern probing); chain has limited third-party RPC provider coverage

loot.note: only 1 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

lyra.note: only 2 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

masa.note: only 1 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

meter.note: only 2 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

moca.note: only 2 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

mp1.note: only 1 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

nexera.note: only 1 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

nibiru.note: only 2 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

openledger.note: only 2 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

plume.note: Chain 98865 'Plume' is a deprecated legacy Plume network (superseded by plume-mainnet/98866, chainKey 'plumephoenix' in this dataset) that the team has been shutting down; no live keyless public RPC could be found/verified. 0 endpoints.

rarible.note: only 2 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

rayls.note: only 1 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

real.note: only 1 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

redbelly.note: only 2 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

reya.note: only 2 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

rise.note: only 1 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

robinhood.note: only 1 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

sagaevm.note: only 2 verified keyless public RPC(s) found after Exa search; chain has limited independent public RPC coverage

sanko.note: small gaming L2 (Caldera rollup); only keyless RPC found is thirdweb's generic proxy (rate-limited). Official mainnet.sanko.xyz and Caldera-hosted alt both NXDOMAIN at check time; no independent infra provider (drpc/ankr/1rpc/blastapi) lists Sanko.

shimmer.note: only one RPC domain exists anywhere (json-rpc.evm.shimmer.network, IOTA Foundation); no independent infra provider hosts Shimmer EVM. 2nd endpoint is thirdweb's generic keyless proxy, not a distinct operator.

skale.note: SKALE Europa chain endpoints are per-chain hashed aliases run by the SKALE Foundation only; no independent provider (drpc/ankr/1rpc) proxies SKALE chains. 2nd endpoint is thirdweb's generic keyless proxy.

space.note: small Avalanche L1 subnet; only RPC is the native Avalanche subnets.avax.network gateway (official). No 3rd-party infra provider indexes this subnet. 2nd endpoint is thirdweb's generic keyless proxy.

subtensorevm.note: Bittensor EVM is very new; only the Opentensor Foundation node and one nodies.app mirror are public. thirdweb does not recognize this chainId; no drpc/ankr/1rpc coverage found.

superposition.note: niche Arbitrum Orbit chain; only official rpc.superposition.so is documented. 2nd endpoint is thirdweb's generic keyless proxy; no independent multi-chain provider (drpc/ankr/1rpc) lists it.

tiltyard.note: Avalanche gaming subnet appears inactive/deprecated at the standard path (subnets.avax.network/tiltyard/mainnet/rpc returns HTTP 405, serves the explorer app instead of proxying RPC). Only working endpoint found is thirdweb's generic keyless proxy.

xchain.note: Conduit-hosted rollup; Conduit's own RPC requires an API key, and the only publicly listed URL (xchain-rpc.kuma.bid) fails TLS hostname verification (cert is for *.t.conduit.xyz, not kuma.bid). Only usable endpoint is thirdweb's generic keyless proxy.

zama.note: fhEVM chain, very recently launched; only rpc.mainnet.zama.org found and verified. thirdweb does not yet recognize this chainId; no drpc/ankr/1rpc/blastapi coverage found.

zkatana.note: chainKey maps to Astar zkEVM mainnet (chainId 3776), not the old zKatana testnet. Astar's documented RPC (rpc.startale.com/astar-zkevm) and Gelato/Dwellir mirrors all return NXDOMAIN (chain appears to have lost its dedicated RPC infra). Only working endpoint is thirdweb's generic keyless proxy.

zklink.note: zkLink Nova's own rpc.zklink.io is the only chain-specific endpoint; no independent multi-chain provider (drpc/ankr/1rpc) lists it. 2nd endpoint is thirdweb's generic keyless proxy.

zkverify.note: zkVerify's mainchain is Substrate-based; official docs list no keyless HTTPS endpoint (only a keyless WSS and a keyed Ankr HTTPS). The one HTTPS endpoint that verified (vflow-rpc.zkverify.io) is an EVM-compatible sidecar, likely single-operator.
